objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(4,12): error TLUA2693: 'Object' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,16): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,17): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'k1'.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,17): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,21): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'v1'.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,26): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,27): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'k2'.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,27): error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,31): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'v2'.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,36): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,39): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'v1'.
objectSubtypeReduction.tlua(5,61): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'v2'.


==== objectSubtypeReduction.tlua (12 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/1164
    
    function foo(x?: object) {
        return Object.entries(x || {})
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'Object' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
            .sort(([k1, v1], [k2, v2]) => v1.name.localeCompare(v2.name));
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
                    ~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'k1'.
